description: S17 forward (hermetic): send a unique source message, forward it via l3_forward_message (resolve the source message + re-send its text to the same conversation), and prove a SECOND self copy of the text exists — i.e. the forward resolved the source and re-sent it. sourceIsSelf:true disambiguates if a running echo peer mirrored the source back inbound. toxee individual-forward is clone + re-send (NO forward metadata, matching the product — deliberately not faked with a marker). Hermetic — sender-side. Maps to S17.
